en_title: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush Takes the Racing Game Series Open World
cn_title: 《风火轮无限冲刺》系列首度开放世界
subtitle: 小车上路，大世界
opus_summary: 《风火轮无限冲刺》在夏日游戏节公布，2026年9月24日登陆PS5、Xbox Series、PC及任天堂Switch 2，售价49.99美元(约合人民币358元)。本作由Milestone开发，首次采用开放世界设计。

paragraphs.en: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush is the next game in the Hot Wheels racing series, and this time it’s going open world.
paragraphs.cn: 《风火轮无限冲刺》是《风火轮》赛车系列的最新作，这一次它将走向开放世界。

paragraphs.en: Revealed at Summer Game Fest alongside a debut trailer, Infinite Rush is due out on September 24, 2026 priced $49.99 across PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X and S, PC via Steam and the Epic Games Store, and Nintendo Switch 2. Yes, that’s another September game to add to the list this year.
paragraphs.cn: 本作在夏日游戏节上随首支预告片一同公布，将于2026年9月24日登陆PlayStation 5、Xbox Series X|S、PC（Steam和Epic Games商店）以及任天堂Switch 2，售价49.99美元(约合人民币358元)。没错，今年9月的游戏列表上又多了一款。

paragraphs.en: Infinite Rush is developed by Milestone, which created the two Hot Wheels Unleashed games. By going open world, Hot Wheels is following in the footsteps of this year’s Forza Horizon 6, and also goes up against open-world racer Clutch.
paragraphs.cn: 《无限冲刺》由Milestone开发，该工作室曾制作两款《风火轮释放》游戏。通过转向开放世界，《风火轮》系列追随了今年《极限竞速：地平线6》的脚步，同时也将与开放世界赛车游戏《Clutch》展开竞争。

paragraphs.en: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush, however, is aimed squarely at a younger audience, primarily kids who play with Hot Wheels cars. Although I imagine there will be plenty of parents who are excited by the prospect of playing the game with their children, too.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，《风火轮无限冲刺》的目标受众明确是更年轻的玩家，主要是那些玩风火轮小车的孩子们。不过我想，也有很多家长会为能和孩子们一起玩这款游戏而感到兴奋。

paragraphs.en: Today's footage showed the dinky cars racing across beaches, urban landscapes and through jungle — there was even a toy King Kong on top of a skyscraper.
paragraphs.cn: 今天的预告片展示了这些小巧的赛车在沙滩、城市景观和丛林中飞驰的场景——甚至还有一只玩具金刚站在摩天大楼顶上。

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 if you need a catch up on what the video game industry has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解游戏行业接下来有什么新动向，这里是2026年夏日游戏节公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在X上通过@wyp100找到他。也可以通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com或保密邮箱wyp100@proton.me联系他。
